title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: Educational video explaining AWS Identity and Access Management fundamentals, covering users, roles, policies, least privilege principle, and IAM Access Analyzer. The content addresses common beginner mistakes like overly permissive access and storing credentials in code.
